summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CSV and PDF export functionality across all 5 pages of the Class Management System. All backend export endpoints and frontend UI integration working correctly.
passed_tests: Frontend: Alumnos page export dropdown with CSV and PDF options
Frontend: Clases page export dropdown with CSV and PDF options
Frontend: Facturación page export dropdown with CSV and PDF options
Frontend: Profesores page export dropdown with CSV and PDF options
Frontend: Asistencia page export dropdown appears after class/schedule selection
Frontend: Export buttons trigger file downloads with success notifications
Frontend: All export buttons use correct data-testid attributes
Frontend: ExportMenu component properly integrated on all 5 pages
Navigation: All pages accessible and loading properly
